group_1.narration: ―Perenelle―@La Pucelle defeated the mighty Witch@"Crépuscule de La Reine, the Twilight of the Queen".
―Perenelle―@She saved France...no, all of Europe@from the hands of the Traitor Queen Isabeau.
―Perenelle―@And she chose the path of being@burned at the stake herself.

group_1.textLeft: It was after that when we noticed something@abnormal.

group_1.textRight: It was as if La Pucelle had "never existed" from the@beginning.
The world was being manipulated by unnatural@forces...
decided to gather the remaining memories of@people and enclose them in books
to prevent them from being lost.

group_1.textLeft: By doing so, we created a space within the books...
That is the "Ark of Feelings" you entered.
Each of the "books" within the Ark
Is composed of the thoughts of people with a@connection to La Pucelle Jeanne.

group_1.textRight: It can be said to be a place where La Pucelle's@dreams are gathered.

group_1.textLeft: I see...

group_1.textRight: By examining the gathered memories in the Ark,
we were trying to find the cause of the world's@abnormalities.
And we were also seeking other collaborators.

group_1.textLeft: However...
Torte entered the space within the book without@permission.

group_1.textRight: Yeah, and we hurriedly followed after her.

group_1.textLeft: Umm...@...I'm sorry.

group_1.textRight: Torte, were you investigating the memories@gathered in the Ark
in order to search for the cause of the world's@abnormalities?

group_1.textLeft: I was planning to investigate, but it's not such a@noble motive.
I just wanted to learn more about this La Pucelle@who shares my name.
That's all I wanted...

group_1.textRight: but you should properly apologize to@Kagome for causing trouble.

group_1.textLeft: Oh...no, it's okay. Even until earlier,
I was thinking about interviewing Jeanne d'Arc...
Such thoughts were in my mind...
Even now, knowing that@Perenelle is a Magical Girl,
I thought I'd like to interview her...
Ah, Kagome...
She records information about Magical Girls.
Mum, you can help her!

group_1.progressNarration: [textBlack:  "To 'seek knowledge'...@  As someone who sought the@  truth, this was my desire@  and my everything."]
[textBlack:  "But meeting La Pucelle@  changed me... Some say@  I've become a bit softer."]

[textBlack:  "At that time...@  La Pucelle realized that becoming@  a Witch was an inevitable fate,@  and she chose the path of being@  burned at the stake in exchange@  for the lives of her comrades."]
[textBlack:  "And La Pucelle...Tart, she was@  imprisoned by her own@  enemies. She left me, who@  was merely a bystander until@  the end, with the words@  'Please take care of everyone'..."]
[textBlack:  "...Witnessing her death,@  for the first time in my long life,@  I prayed to someone other than@  my husband."]
[textBlack:  "However, all I could do@  was pray..."]
[textBlack:  "If my daughter is interested in@  La Pucelle and wishes to know@  about her way of life,"]
[textBlack:  "I sincerely want her to think@  about what she can do for@  the late Jeanne."]
